mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pet_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_profiles (user_id, name, pet_type, breed, birthday, weight, size, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{petType}, #{breed}, #{birthday}, #{weight}, #{size}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pet_profiles WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
